fd_explain:
📘 **Fixed Deposit (FD)**

**1) Meaning of FD**
A Fixed Deposit (FD) is a safe investment where you deposit money for a fixed period and earn guaranteed interest.

**2) Jargons used in FD**
• **Principal:** Initial amount invested
• **Interest Rate:** Percentage earned annually
• **Tenure:** Duration of investment
• **Maturity:** Final amount received at end of tenure

**3) Types of FD**
• **Regular FD** → Standard fixed deposit for general users
• **Tax-saving FD** → FD with tax benefits under Section 80C
• **Senior Citizen FD** → Higher interest rate for people above 60
• **Cumulative FD** → Interest is compounded and paid at maturity
• **Non-cumulative FD** → Interest is paid periodically (monthly/quarterly)
fd_explain_roman:

**1) Meaning of FD**
A Fixed Deposit (FD) is a safe investment where you deposit money for a fixed period and earn guaranteed interest.

**2) Jargons used in FD**
• **Principal:** Initial amount invested
• **Interest Rate:** Percentage earned annually
• **Tenure:** Duration of investment
• **Maturity:** Final amount received at end of tenure

**3) Types of FD**
• **Regular FD** → Standard fixed deposit for general users
• **Tax-saving FD** → FD with tax benefits under Section 80C
• **Senior Citizen FD** → Higher interest rate for people above 60
• **Cumulative FD** → Interest is compounded and paid at maturity
• **Non-cumulative FD** → Interest is paid periodically (monthly/quarterly)
ask_amount: Please tell amount, rate and time (example: ₹50000 for 2 years at 7%)
fd_start_flow: To start an FD, please visit our nearest branch or use the 'Book FD' option in our mobile app. You can also start manually by providing your details here.
fd_rate_info: Our current FD interest rates are up to 7.5% per annum for general citizens and 8.0% for senior citizens.
